title: workspaces — artisan commands
description: Artisan commands this module ships. Registered by `WorkspacesServiceProvider::registerCommands()`. Audience is either `ops:*` (operator-facing, called during deploy or ops runbooks) or `dev:*` (developer-only, useful during local dev).

commands.signature: workspaces:sync-catalogue {--dry-run : Show what would change without writing}
commands.description: Mirrors `data/business-types.json` into `config/workspaces.php` (business_types key). Run on every deploy so a Laravel dev never edits config directly. Idempotent.

commands.signature: workspaces:reverify-domains {--workspace= : Limit to a single workspace slug} {--stale-hours=24 : Only reverify domains whose last_check_at is older than N hours}
commands.description: Enumerates matching Domains and dispatches VerifyDomainDnsJob for each. Called hourly via schedule.json + manually during incident response.

commands.signature: workspaces:archive {workspace : Workspace slug or id} {--reason= : Free-form reason recorded in the audit trail}
commands.description: Archives a Workspace (soft-delete + status=archived). Dispatches WorkspaceArchived event. Refuses if `is_system=true`. Refuses if a suspension is still in effect (must resume first). Prompts for confirmation unless --force.

commands.signature: workspaces:hard-delete-archived {--older-than=P30D : ISO-8601 duration; only archived workspaces past this window are eligible} {--dry-run}
commands.description: Enumerates archived workspaces past the retention window and dispatches HardDeleteArchivedWorkspaceJob for each. Called daily via schedule.json.

commands.signature: workspaces:seed-defaults {--fresh : Truncate + re-seed the default Application row}
commands.description: Seeds the default Application (`app_academorix`) and its subordinate resources for local dev. NEVER run in production (guarded by `app()->isProduction()`).
Snapshots the aggregated subprocessor registry to the compliance store. Called weekly via schedule.json.
